children.text: The definition of “security” in does not include any security-based swap agreement (as defined in ).section 77b(a)(1) of this titlesection 78c(a)(78) of this title

The Commission is prohibited from registering, or requiring, recommending, or suggesting, the registration under this subchapter of any security-based swap agreement (as defined in ). If the Commission becomes aware that a registrant has filed a registration statement with respect to such a swap agreement, the Commission shall promptly so notify the registrant. Any such registration statement with respect to such a swap agreement shall be void and of no force or effect.section 78c(a)(78) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: promulgating, interpreting, or enforcing rules; or

References in this subchapter to the “purchase” or “sale” of a security-based swap agreement shall be deemed to mean the execution, termination (prior to its scheduled maturity date), assignment, exchange, or similar transfer or conveyance of, or extinguishing of rights or obligations under, a security-based swap agreement (as defined in ), as the context may require.section 78c(a)(78) of this title
